sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66830" key="metanohtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετανο-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n66830.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">given to repentance</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:11:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
